Venture into the enchanting world of Viola Hair Extensions, where each strand resonates with the essence of pure luxury. Our realm is devoted to the artistry of human hair extensions, offering an opulent selection that caters to the discerning tastes of top-tier hairdressing and beauty salons. With a commitment to excellence, we proudly present our diverse array of real human hair extensions, each crafted to transform and elevate the hair styling experience.

The genesis of grandeur: Viola hair extensions

From the heart of Romsey, UK, Viola Hair Extensions emerged in 2011 as a bastion of quality in the world of real hair extensions. Ascending swiftly as a premier supplier, we've championed the art of human hair extensions, extending our reach to global markets, including Poland. Our portfolio features an exquisite variety of human hair extensions clip ins and tape ins, ensuring a seamless blend with natural hair for an impeccable finish.

The emporium of elegance: Viola's human hair extensions

Our online sanctuary offers an array of human hair extensions tape in and clip ins, showcasing a rich diversity of shades and styles. From the timeless allure of blondes and brunettes to the unique charm of vibrant hues, our extensions human hair collection provides endless possibilities for creative expression. Each product, be it tape in or clip in, stands as a hallmark of our dedication to quality and style.

The pinnacle of prestige: Wholesale human hair extensions

Viola Hair Extensions is not just a supplier; it's a partner in the artistic journey of hairdressing. Our wholesale human hair extensions, complemented by in-depth training resources, empower salons to transcend conventional boundaries. This blend of high-grade real human hair extensions and expert knowledge equips your salon to achieve new heights of creativity and prestige.

The quintessence of luxury: Slavic real hair extensions

The dream woven into reality: At Viola Hair Extensions, we transform the vision of full, radiant hair into tangible elegance. Our 100% natural Slavic real hair extensions epitomize the pinnacle of hair luxury. These extensions, renowned for their density and sheen, elevate hair artistry, offering unparalleled beauty and versatility. Our expansive range includes various styles, from the effortless charm of clip ins to the seamless sophistication of tape ins, each a testament to our unyielding pursuit of perfection.

A symphony of hair artistry tools and human hair extensions

Beyond just extensions: Viola Hair Extensions extends its offerings to include a comprehensive suite of tools and accessories essential for working with hair extensions and human hair. Our range encompasses both the fundamental and the innovative – from manual tools that ensure precision to electric devices that add flair to styling. Our commitment goes beyond supplying; we offer training products and materials to ensure that every application of our human hair extensions, be it tape in or clip in, is executed with artistry and finesse.

Explore the artistry of human hair extensions with Viola

Join us in this luxurious journey at Viola Hair Extensions. Embrace the world of high-quality human hair extensions, and let our collection of tape ins, clip ins, and Slavic extensions redefine your salon's approach to hair beauty. Each strand we offer is not just hair; it's a promise of elegance and quality that will leave an indelible mark on the world of hairdressing.

OUR STORE

Saturday, Closed
Sunday, Closed

Indulge in the luxury of rich, warm hues, embrace the exotic energy of Rio Sunrise, and transform your style into a stunning extension of your unique personality. pages/pages__terms-1.title: Terms – Viola Hair Extensions
pages/pages__terms-1.metaDescription: Welcome to violahairextensions.co.uk. Your use of violahairextensions.co.uk, and any order from us constitutes your agreement to these terms and conditions. 1. DEFINITIONS “Buyer” means the individual or organisation who buys or agrees to buy the Goods from the Seller; “Consumer” shall have the meaning ascribed in sect
pages/pages__terms-1.copy:
TERMS
Welcome to violahairextensions.co.uk. Your use of violahairextensions.co.uk, and any order from us constitutes your agreement to these terms and conditions.
1. DEFINITIONS
“Buyer” means the individual or organisation who buys or agrees to buy the Goods from the Seller;
“Consumer” shall have the meaning ascribed in section 12 of the Unfair Contract Terms Act 1977;
“Contract” means the contract between the Seller and the Buyer for the sale and purchase of Goods incorporating these Terms and Conditions;
“Goods” means the articles that the Buyer agrees to buy from the Seller;
“Seller” means violahairextensions.co.uk of Unit 6 Basepoint, Premier Way, Abbey Park Industrial Estate, Romsey, Hampshire, SO519AQ, United Kingdom  that owns and operates violahairextensions.co.uk.co.uk;
“Terms and Conditions” means the terms and conditions of sale set out in this agreement and any special terms and conditions agreed in writing by the Seller;
“Website” means violahairextensions.co.uk.
2. CONDITIONS
Nothing in these Terms and Conditions shall affect the Buyer’s statutory rights as a Consumer.
These Terms and Conditions shall apply to all contracts for the sale of Goods by the Seller to the Buyer and shall prevail over any other documentation or communication from the Buyer.
Acceptance of delivery of the Goods shall be deemed conclusive evidence of the Buyer’s acceptance of these Terms and Conditions.
Any variation to these Terms and Conditions (including any special terms and conditions agreed between the parties) shall be inapplicable unless agreed in writing by the Seller.
Any complaints should be addressed to the Seller’s address stated in clause 1.5.
3. ORDERING
All orders for Goods shall be deemed to be an offer by the Buyer to purchase Goods pursuant to these Terms and Conditions and are subject to acceptance by the Seller. The Seller may choose not to accept an order for any reason.
Where the Goods ordered by the Buyer are not available from stock the Buyer shall be notified and given the option to either wait until the Goods are available from stock or cancel the order and receive a full refund within 28 days.
Information on the site detailing stock levels should not be viewed as a guarantee of availability and is a guide only. If we do not supply the goods for any reason we will not charge you for these and we will refund any money already paid for them. However, we will not be responsible for compensating you for any other losses you may suffer if we do not supply the goods.
When making an order through the Website, the technical steps the Buyer needs to take to complete the order process are described in The Order Process Section below
Users of the website are able to add their selected products to their shopping cart. When they have compiled a list of products that they wish to order they can proceed to the order process from the cart page. If the user is not logged into the website they will be asked to either log in or register for an account. Once logged in and in the order process a user can specify their delivery details and payment details before completing the order. The order takes place over an encrypted connection and credit details are not held by Viola Hair Extensions after the payment is received. The user will be given an individual reference code for the order and will be sent a confirmation email. Orders will then be processed by Viola Hair Extensions depending on the individual specifications of the order. If there is a problem with the order Viola Hair Extensions will contact the user by the details provided by the user on registration or during the order.
Pictures on the website are for guidance only, especially regarding hair colours; depending on the device used, the shade might look different. For the most accurate colour match, a Viola colour ring must be used. Please note that natural batch variations may occur. The Seller cannot be held liable for any discrepancies in colour matching. We recommend replacing our Viola colour swatches every 9–12 months to ensure the shades remain as accurate and fresh as possible. 
During over the phone orders, we will send your order to your email address and you must confirm that this is all correct before your order is shipped out.
Colour Disclaimer: actual product colours may vary slightly from the photos due to differences in lighting, screen settings, and standard variations that occur during the manufacturing process.
Product Specification: Products are checked prior to dispatch to ensure advertised length and weight. Due to natural strand weight variation, the number of strands per pack may vary slightly, while the overall pack weight remains as specified.

4. PRICE AND PAYMENT
The price of the Goods shall be that stipulated on the Website. All product prices are shown exclusive of VAT. VAT will be calculated and added during checkout, prior to confirming the order. Prices exclude delivery charges unless clearly stated otherwise.
After the order is received the Seller shall confirm by email the details, description and price for the Goods together with information on the right to cancel if the Buyer is a Consumer.
Payment of the price plus VAT and delivery charges must be made in full before dispatch of the Goods.
Payment Options
We are pleased to offer many ways for you to pay for your order. We currently accept the following credit and debit cards: MasterCard, Visa, Maestro (Switch), Solo and Electron.
We are also happy to accept payment by BACS transfer (please make payment to Viola Hair Extensions Ltd, Account number: 83438449, Sort Code: 20-79-29) and Barclays Pingit (please send payment to: 07783900334).
Internet Site Security

At violahairextensions.co.uk we take your security very seriously. We use the strongest available encryption technology to keep your details safe. Our secure servers are monitored 24 hours a day, 7 days a week to ensure that our systems and data are not compromised
5. RIGHTS OF SELLER

The Seller reserves the right to periodically update prices on the Website, which cannot be guaranteed for any period of time. The Seller shall make every effort to ensure prices are correct at the point at which the Buyer places an order.
While we try and ensure that all prices on our website are accurate, errors may occur. In the event a product is listed at an incorrect price due to typographical error or error in pricing information from our suppliers, taxes or duty changes, we shall have the right to refuse or cancel any orders listed at the incorrect price whether or not the order has been confirmed. If we discover an error in the price of goods you have ordered we will inform you as soon as possible and give you the option of reconfirming your order at the correct price or cancelling it. If we are unable to contact you we will treat the order as cancelled. If you cancel and you have already paid for the goods, you will receive a full refund back to the original form of payment.
The Seller reserves the right to withdraw any Goods from the Website at any time.
The Seller shall not be liable to anyone for withdrawing any Goods from the Website or for refusing to process an order.
6. AGE OF CONSENT

Where Goods may only be purchased by persons of a certain age the Buyer will be asked when placing an order to declare that they are of the appropriate legal age to purchase the Goods.
If the Seller discovers that the Buyer is not legally entitled to order certain Goods, the Seller shall be entitled to cancel the order immediately, without notice.
7. DELIVERY

Goods supplied within the UK will normally be delivered within in accordance with our delivery schedule and/or the acceptance of order.
violahairextensions.co.uk always endeavours to adhere to delivery estimates but these are always estimates.
If your order is placed before 2pm the items will be shipped the same day, otherwise they will be shipped the next working day.  We do not ship on weekends or bank holidays
In any event time of delivery shall not be of the essence and the Seller shall not be liable for any losses, costs, damages or expenses incurred by the Buyer or any third party arising directly or indirectly out of any failure to meet any estimated delivery date.
Delivery of the Goods shall be made to the Buyer’s address specified in the order. Most items sent by violahairextensions.co.uk need to be signed for and the Buyer shall make all arrangements necessary to take delivery of the Goods whenever they are tendered for delivery.
Lost parcels - if you have not received your parcel, you need to contact us within 14 days from the date of purchase. After this time we will not be able to start investigation with the Courier's Company. 
The Majority of our orders are sent via services provided by Royal Mail and DPD Local.
Bank Holidays: No collections or deliveries will be made on Bank Holidays
Weather Conditions: Royal Mail, DPD Local have to ensure both the Health and Safety of their employees. Poor weather conditions can often warrant changes in delivery and collection times. We are unable to offer refunds for any costs associated with delays caused by the weather.
Weekends: Deliveries may be made on a Saturday
Christmas Deliveries: Orders should be placed within the guidelines issued by Royal Mail or DPD Local at their website
Courier Next Day
Weekdays:  £12.50

Courier 1-2 Days

Monday-Friday (anytime up until the end of the day): £9.50; *PLEASE NOTE, THIS IS NOT A GUARANTEED NEXT DAY SERVICE*

Saturday Delivery (anytime up until the end of the day) £16.00 (please note that this applies to any orders placed Monday-Friday before 2pm only, we are closed on weekends)

You can select any of these delivery services at the checkout, but you must order before 2pm weekdays. If you miss this deadline, we will do our best to get your order out anyway, but if we are unable, we will take care of it on the following working day.

Royal Mail Express and DPD delivery is available in the UK only, and on working days. For delivery on Saturdays, please use Saturday Express Delivery.
*We will not be liable for delays that occur with our delivery partners.

INTERNATIONAL DELIVERY

It’s easy to buy from us if you do not live in the UK! And with our simple delivery pricing schedule, it’s cost-effective too! Enjoy our low prices – wherever you are! Once you are ready to buy, select your country at the checkout, and our site will automatically apply the delivery charges.

Your order will be delivered on a DAP (“Delivery At Place”) service. This means UK VAT is removed from your order by us at checkout, but you will be liable for your local VAT and any duty prior to receiving your parcel. This will be estimated in UK pounds but will be payable in local currency and may be subject to exchange rate fluctuations.

Please note that without payment of this your order will not be released from customs into your country and may be returned to Viola Hair Extensions. Payment of local VAT and duty is your responsibility and not included in the price that you pay to Viola Hair Extensions.

It is your responsibility to reclaim any local VAT and duty paid should you decide to return your order under our returns policy.

8. CANCELLATIONS AND RETURNS
The Buyer may cancel the order for any reason up to the point of dispatch and any payments made by the Buyer shall be refunded in full within 28 days. However, most of time we ship your order within just few hours. Once they are in route to you, the order cannot be cancelled or refused unless instructed by us in written. If you do refuse it, you will be responsible for charges of shipping and handling both ways and additional restocking fee.
The Buyer shall inspect the Goods immediately upon receipt and shall notify the Seller by e-mail within 7 days if the Goods are damaged or do not comply with any of the Contract. If the Buyer fails to do so the Buyer shall be deemed to have accepted the Goods.

Hair extensions are classified as hygiene-sensitive goods. In line with UK law, once such products have been unsealed and used, they are no longer eligible for return or refund.

Under the Consumer Contracts (Information, Cancellation and Additional Charges) Regulations 2013, Schedule 9, paragraph 13(c):
“The consumer loses the right to cancel the contract when the goods are sealed for health protection or hygiene reasons and have been unsealed after delivery.”

Where a claim of damage is made, the Goods shall be returned by the Buyer to the Seller within 28 days of delivery. The Buyer shall be entitled to a replacement or a full refund (including delivery costs) plus any return postal charges if the Goods are in fact damaged.
If you are a consumer. We want you to be delighted every time you shop with us and know that we all change our minds sometimes! If you don’t like something you have bought from us you have the right, in addition to your other rights, to cancel the Contract and return the Goods for any reason within 14 days of taking the delivery.
Goods must be returned by the Buyer at the Buyer’s expense within 28 days from receipt of purchase. 
All products returned without the appropriate return form will not be processed until the correct paperwork is received. 
For hygiene reasons ALL products must be in an unused and ‘as new’ condition with all the original packaging, and if applicable, all seals in-tact for the return to be accepted.
'As new’ condition with all the original packaging includes: Viola black packaging in its original marking, clear plastic bag, intact silver twine and for a new Viola packaging plastic bag and white hair net. 
All packaging must be unmarked, undamaged, untampered with, and returned in the same condition as received. Any returns received with damaged, marked, tampered, or otherwise non-compliant packaging may be subject to a processing and repackaging fee, which will be deducted from any refund due.
 The Buyer will receive a refund of all monies paid for the Goods excluding delivery charges. A refund or exchange will not be provided for products returned in a used condition or been tampered with. Also, the Seller shall not be held responsible for results of any alterations (dying, bleaching) or treatments performed by the Buyer or any third party after purchase.
Any products returned that do not comply with the minimum return requirements outlined in our Returns Policy and these Terms & Conditions will not be eligible for a refund or exchange. Such items can be returned to the customer once the applicable return shipping fee has been paid. If payment for the return shipping is not received within 30 days of the invoice being issued, the items will be deemed unwanted. By failing to pay the return shipping fee within this timeframe, you authorise us to dispose of the items on your behalf, and no further claims can be made in respect of those goods.
When you return your item to us, please make sure that it’s well packed to protect it from damage. Where returned Goods are found to be damaged due to the Buyer’s fault the Buyer will be liable for the cost of remedying such damage.
Online courses are non-refundable once access to the digital content has been provided. If the Buyer wishes to return a physical course kit, the Seller must be notified in writing prior to the kit or online content being dispatched or issued.
SALE items/CLEARANCE, Wigs and Bespoke items are NON-returnable and not covered under the 190 day guarantee.
9 LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
Except as may be implied by law where the Buyer is dealing as a Consumer, in the event of any breach of these Terms and Conditions by the Seller the remedies of the Buyer shall be limited to damages which shall in no circumstances exceed the price of the Goods and the Seller shall under no circumstances be liable for any indirect, incidental or consequential loss or damage whatever.
Nothing in these Terms and Conditions shall exclude or limit the liability of the Seller for death or personal injury resulting from the negligence of the Seller or that of the Seller’s agents or employees.
10. WAIVER
No waiver by the Seller (whether express or implied) in enforcing any of its rights under this contract shall prejudice its rights to do so in the future.
11. FORCE MAJEURE
The Seller shall not be liable for any delay or failure to perform any of its obligations if the delay or failure results from events or circumstances outside its reasonable control, including but not limited to, acts of God, strikes, lock outs, accidents, war, fire, failure of any communications, telecommunications or computer system, breakdown of plant or machinery or shortage or unavailability of raw materials from a natural source of supply, and the Seller shall be entitled to a reasonable extension of its obligations.
12. SEVERANCE
If any term or provision of these Terms and Conditions is held invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason by any court of competent jurisdiction such provision shall be severed and the remainder of the provisions hereof shall continue in full force and effect as if these Terms and Conditions had been agreed with the invalid illegal or unenforceable provision eliminated.
13. CHANGES TO TERMS AND CONDITIONS
The Seller shall be entitled to alter these Terms and Conditions at any time but this right shall not affect the existing Terms and Conditions accepted by the Buyer upon making a purchase.
14. GOVERNING LAW AND JURISDICTION
These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the law of England and the parties hereby submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the English courts.
We agree to meet the obligations set out under the consumer protection laws currently in force including:
the Consumer Protection Act. 1987;
the supply of Goods and Services Act 1982;
the Consumer Credit Act 1974;
the Consumer Protection (Distance Selling) Regulations 2000.
the Sale of Goods Act 1979;
the Trade Descriptions Act 1968;
the Unfair Contract Terms Act 1977 and the 1994 Regulations
the Consumer Contracts (Information, Cancellation and Additional Charges) Regulations 2013

190 Days Quality Guarantee

Viola Hair Extensions comes with 190 days Quality Guaranteed this is provided that the extensions are fitted by a qualified Extensionist, follow the aftercare advice and use Viola approved aftercare products.

Please note that any complaints or issues regarding hair extensions will only be accepted from customers with a certificate, as our products are for professional use only.

What does this warranty cover?

Any defects that arise due to faulty materials or workmanship will either be replaced or issued a credit to spend in-store or online.

What is not covered?

Accidental damage or misuse.
Damage occurred when exposed to excessive heat, salt water, UV rays and chlorine.
Damages caused by the owner modifying, attempting to fix or otherwise altering the product.
Costs incurred for diagnosing, repairing, removing, installing, shipping, servicing, or handling.
Items sold at sale price. All sale hair extensions are final sale and are not eligible for a return, refund or warranty.
Certain colours may fade over time. Fading of colours will not be considered a manufacturer defect.
After 190 days from date of purchase the hair guarantee will be considered expired, no claims can be made after this time.

The guarantee is subject to the following provisions;

Must be correctly fitted by a qualified Hair Extensionist in the relevant application method.
Aftercare followed in accordance with the aftercare instructions. For more information regarding aftercare please follow the link (insert link)
Viola aftercare products must be used (approximately 1000ml shampoo and 500ml conditioner within 6 months) as they have been specially formulated to keep the quality of the hair extensions. Viola aftercare products must be purchased alongside the hair extensions. Must be able to provide proof of purchas

pages/pages__privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy We view your customer security as paramount, below is an outline of our security policy but if you have any further queries, please contact our Customer Service team. Any personal information you provide to us and from which you can be identified is stored securely and confidentially and is processed fai
pages/pages__privacy.copy:
PRIVACY
Privacy Policy

We view your customer security as paramount, below is an outline of our security policy but if you have any further queries, please contact our Customer Service team. Any personal information you provide to us and from which you can be identified is stored securely and confidentially and is processed fairly and lawfully in accordance with this privacy policy

We take appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect against unauthorised or unlawful processing of your personal information, including encrypting your information to applicable industry standards.

During your visit to our site we may gather certain personal information that is necessary to set up your account, for the purposes of billing, delivery of your goods and queries. We only keep your information for as long as is necessary to process your order, process any applicable refunds, respond to any complaints/feedback or to provide you with promotional information you have subscribed to.

Ordinarily we do not have access to your financial information which is securely transferred directly to our card processing agents and who process it on our instructions.

We supply your information electronically to our couriers who need your details to deliver your orders

When you register your details with us, you have the option to subscribe to future promotions and special offers. You may unsubscribe from this at any time.

We do not transfer your information outside the European Economic Area (“EEA”) unless you are a user located outside the EEA in which case we may need to transfer your information to deliver your goods, process payment/refunds, or to send you promotional information you have subscribed to.

Our website can recognise past users by using cookies. Cookies personalise your visits to our website to meet your individual preferences. You can disable cookies by adjusting your internet settings.

When you supply your information to us you accept the risks associated with the Internet and will not hold us responsible for any loss of your information unless we have breached our duty of care to you.

Cookie Policy

This policy explains what cookies are, how we use them and how you can switch them off.

1. HOW WE USE COOKIES

We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and to enable our site to function efficiently. In particular, we use cookies to:

enable you to set up an account, place orders and make payments;
remember items you place into your shopping basket;
remember items you have been looking at so that you can quickly and easily go back to an item you looked at previously;
enhance your shopping experience.

2. WHAT ARE COOKIES?
Cookies are small files which are stored on your internet browsing device (e.g computer, tablet or phone). Cookies don’t store your personal details such as your credit card details, your name or your date of birth.

3. WHAT TYPES OF COOKIES DO WE USE?

Our site uses session cookies and persistent cookies. Session cookies operate from the moment you log on to the site until the moment you log off. Once you log off session cookies are deleted. Persistent cookies will not be deleted after each session.

Strictly Necessary Cookies are essential to our site, if these are disabled, your experience on our site may be interrupted and you may not be able to use a shopping basket or make payment.

Performance Cookies collect anonymous data about visitors. We use the data to improve your future experience and identify issues that our users may be experiencing.

Functionality Cookies customise the look and appearance of our site. For example, a functionality cookie will remember your username and language preferences next time you visit.

Targeting or Advertising Cookies deliver advertisements which are tailored to your web activity. A targeting cookie tracks what you click on whilst on our site, and may share details of what you click on with other organisations such as advertisers. These cookies can also help us to measure the effectiveness of an advertising campaign.

4. WHAT HAPPENS IF I TURN OFF COOKIES?

If you disable or delete cookies you may not be able to shop or access important parts of our site. Further information on cookies, including instructions on how to amend your browser settings to turn off cookies, is available widely online.

pages/pages__returns-delivery.copy:
RETURNS & DELIVERY

COURIER SERVICES 
Courier 1 - 2 working days - £9.50 (not guaranteed)
Courier Next Working Day - £12.50 (not guaranteed)

Courier Saturday - £16.00

For same day despatch orders must be placed before 2pm Monday to Friday (excluding bank holidays).

Orders placed after the cut off time will be despatched the next working day.

If the shipping address is outside of the UK, or the postcode starts with the following from the list, the cut off time for same day despatch will be 1pm, this is due to the courier services for these areas.

BT, GY, JE, IM, IV, HS, KW, PH, AB, PO (30, 32, 33, 36, 37, 38), TR (21, 22, 23, 24, 25) & ZE

Viola Hair Extensions reserves the right to change delivery services to ensure the correct service is chosen, due to certain couriers not delivering to all areas and value of order.

Product Returns

The Buyer may cancel the order for any reason up to the point of dispatch and any payments made by the Buyer shall be refunded in full within 28 days. However, most of the time we ship your order within just a few hours. Once they are in route to you, the order cannot be cancelled or refused unless instructed by us in writing. If you do refuse it, you will be responsible for charges of shipping and handling both ways and an additional restocking fee.
The Buyer shall inspect the Goods immediately upon receipt and shall notify the Seller by e-mail within 7 days if the Goods are damaged or do not comply with any of the Contract. If the Buyer fails to do so the Buyer shall be deemed to have accepted the Goods.

Hair extensions are classified as hygiene-sensitive goods. In line with UK law, once such products have been unsealed and used, they are no longer eligible for return or refund.

Under the Consumer Contracts (Information, Cancellation and Additional Charges) Regulations 2013, Schedule 9, paragraph 13(c):
“The consumer loses the right to cancel the contract when the goods are sealed for health protection or hygiene reasons and have been unsealed after delivery.”

Where a claim of damage is made, the Goods shall be returned by the Buyer to the Seller within 28 days of delivery. The Buyer shall be entitled to a replacement or a full refund (including delivery costs) plus any return postal charges if the Goods are in fact damaged.
If you are a consumer. We want you to be delighted every time you shop with us and know that we all change our minds sometimes! If you don’t like something you have bought from us you have the right, in addition to your other rights, to cancel the Contract and return the Goods for any reason within 14 days of taking the delivery. 

Returns must include a completed Viola Returns form to be included with the returned goods.

Goods must be returned by the Buyer at the Buyer’s expense within 28 days of cancellation in an unused and ‘as new’ condition with all the original packaging, and if applicable, all seals in-tact. The Buyer will receive a refund of all monies paid for the Goods excluding delivery charges. A refund or exchange will not be provided for products returned in a used condition or been tampered with.

Tape tabs must be returned with all Tape-in and Secret Tape-in hair extensions. If the tapes are not returned with the hair the cost for the tabs will be deducted from the refund.

All packaging must be unmarked, undamaged, untampered with, and returned in the same condition as received. Any returns received with damaged, marked, tampered, or otherwise non-compliant packaging may be subject to a processing and repackaging fee, which will be deducted from any refund due.
When you return your item to us, please make sure that it’s well packed to protect it from damage. Where returned Goods are found to be damaged due to the Buyer’s fault the Buyer will be liable for the cost of remedying such damage.
Online courses are non-refundable once access to the digital content has been provided. If the Buyer wishes to return a physical course kit, the Seller must be notified in writing prior to the kit or online content being dispatched or issued.
SALE items/CLEARANCE, Wigs and Bespoke items are NON-returnable.
PRODUCT DELIVERY
Goods supplied within the UK will normally be delivered within in accordance with our delivery schedule and/or the acceptance of the order.
violahairextensions.co.uk always endeavours to adhere to delivery estimates but these are always estimates.
If your order is placed before 2 pm the items will be shipped the same day (Monday to Friday excluding bank holidays). Otherwise, orders will be shipped the next working day. We do NOT ship on weekends or bank holidays.
In any event time of delivery shall not be of the essence and the Seller shall not be liable for any losses, costs, damages or expenses incurred by the Buyer or any third party arising directly or indirectly out of any failure to meet any estimated delivery date.
Delivery of the Goods shall be made to the Buyer’s address specified in the order. Most items sent by violahairextensions.co.uk need to be signed for and the Buyer shall make all arrangements necessary to take delivery of the Goods whenever they are tendered for delivery.
If a claim such as denial of receipt, damage on receipt, parcel lost, etc, is to be made against any of the courier services used. A refund or replacement will only be processed after the courier service has investigated and confirmed the claim.
In the event of signature dispute the recipient is expected to complete and sign the denial of receipt letter from our claim department and if they do not that they are agreeing to being in receipt of the goods and forfeit the right to chargeback.
The Majority of our orders are sent via services provided by Royal Mail and DPD Local.
Bank Holidays: No collections or deliveries will be made on Bank Holidays
Weather Conditions: Royal Mail and DPD Local have to ensure both the Health and Safety of their employees. Poor weather conditions can often warrant changes in delivery and collection times. We are unable to offer refunds for any costs associated with delays caused by the weather.
Weekends: Deliveries may be made on a Saturday
Christmas Deliveries: Orders should be placed within the guidelines issued by Royal Mail or DPD Local at their website
COURIER SERVICES  
Viola ships with the following delivery companies depending on which service suits the areas and order best.
DPD
No longer asking the recipient to sign for items delivered.
Some services require a person to be at the property at time of delivery.
Royal Mail
Requires a person to be at the property at time of delivery.
DHL
Some services require a person to be at the property at time of delivery.

*We will not be liable for delays that occur with our delivery partners.

International Delivery

It’s easy to buy from us if you do not live in the UK! And with our simple pricing schedule, it’s cost-effective too! Enjoy our low prices – wherever you are! Once you are ready to buy, select your country at the checkout, and our site will automatically apply the delivery charges.

Your order will be delivered on a DAP (“Delivery At Place”) service. This means UK VAT is removed from your order by us at checkout, but you will be liable for your local VAT and any duty prior to receiving your parcel. This will be estimated in UK pounds but will be payable in local currency and may be subject to exchange rate fluctuations.

Please note that without payment of this your order will not be released from customs into your country and may be returned to Viola Hair Extensions. Payment of local VAT and duty is your responsibility and not included in the price that you pay to Viola Hair Extensions.

It is your responsibility to reclaim any local VAT and duty paid should you decide to return your order under our returns policy.

pages/pages__aftercare.title: Aftercare – Viola Hair Extensions
pages/pages__aftercare.metaDescription: Viola Hair Extensions comes with 190 days Quality Guaranteed, the longest in the UK! It has been proven that if you follow the aftercare, have regular maintenance and along with Viola specially formulated aftercare products, our hair will last even longer than 190 days! 360 days or even more! For your extensions to las
pages/pages__aftercare.copy:
AFTERCARE

Viola Hair Extensions comes with 190 days Quality Guaranteed, the longest in the UK! It has been proven that if you follow the aftercare, have regular maintenance and along with Viola specially formulated aftercare products, our hair will last even longer than 190 days! 360 days or even more!

For your extensions to last looking and feeling strong please be faithful to the aftercare advice.

WASHING

To keep your hair extensions healthy and looking luxurious use Viola Hair Extension Shampoo and Conditioner, our products have been specially formulated to coat, seal, help restore and add shine.

To ensure that the extensions do not become matted, detangle your hair before washing.
In order to reduce pulling and tangles, keep head upright when washing, do not rub or twist your hair instead, massage the scalp gently with your fingertips.
Avoid putting conditioner onto the bonds as it can cause the beads or glue to slip out of the hair.
When you have finished washing, gently squeeze out the excess water and pat the hair dry, do not wrap your hair up in a towel, as this will cause hair to become matted.

BRUSHING/BLOWDRYING

For your extensions to maintain their excellent condition make sure you use the correct hair extension brush. Either a bristle or detangle brush, alongside the right technique as these will reduce the pressure on the bonds and the roots.

Hair will become damaged when brushed whilst it is still wet.
Once the hair is completely dry, brush starting from the ends and work your way up towards the roots, all the time supporting the hair by holding the bonds.
Viola offers a range of hair brushes that are specially designed not to catch and pull on the hair extensions.

STYLING

The hair extensions can be straightened, curled, blow dried etc, bear in mind that frequent exposure to heat will have an impact on the lifespan of the hair extensions as it would on your own hair.

To avoid damaging the bonds be sure that they do not come into direct contact with any of the above as it will cause the bonds to melt and become fragile.

Protect your hair against heat by using either Viola Shake & Protect or Viola Thermal Protection Serum, both provide the hair with a protective coat against the damaging effects.

To maintain extensions glossy sheen, Viola Extension Boost, Viola Hair Food and Viola Argan Oil (only for brunettes) used regularly will replenish the essential oils and vitamins, that are naturally lost over time.

DYING/COLOURING

Any processes such as bleaching, dying etc, will shorten the lifespan of your hair extensions. If you do choose to, be sure that it is carried out by a professional, as the outcome may vary due to the processes that the extensions have already undergone. Altering the extensions by any of the above will cause the guarantee to become invalid.

SLEEPING

Whilst sleeping you toss, turn and rub your head against the pillow, this causes your hair to become tangled and matted.

Therefore, it is particularly important that before going to bed be sure that the hair is;

Completely dry as wet hair will become matted.
Brushed and braided into one plait.

HOLIDAY

Extra care must be taken when hair extensions come into contact with Chlorine, salt water, UV and heat as they can cause light hair to change in colour as well as leaving extensions feeling dry and brittle.

To keep your hair feeling and looking velvety soft during the summer be sure to;

Protect your hair from harmful UV rays always covers hair when exposed to direct sunlight.
Sun cream/ oils must not come into contact with your hair extensions as it can turn the hair pink/orange tones. Always wear hair up in a bun so that the hair does not touch any area of the skin where the cream has been applied.
Chlorine and salt water can cause the hair to turn green. To avoid hair from getting wet, before swimming wear your hair up out of the water in a bun. If your hair does get wet, wash immediately with Viola Extensions Shampoo and Conditioner as it is incredibly difficult to reverse the changes.
Viola Conditioning Boost adds minerals that are vital for keeping the extensions and your own hair healthy and glossy.

If you do notice that your hair is showing signs of discolouration you can use a small amount of Viola Purple Shampoo as the pigment may counteract the brassy tones. Recommend that you test before applying to the whole head.

For more information please read FAQ.

MAINTENANCE

Your extensions will stay in excellent condition with regular maintenance, alongside careful attention and the correct care.

Maintenance is required between 4 to 12 weeks (depending on the type of extensions) this is to avoid damaging your own hair and to check that all is going well and nothing needs to be corrected.

Our Hair Extensions comes with 190 days Quality Guaranteed, this is as long as the above aftercare is followed and the extensions are fitted by a qualified Extensionist.

Not only do we supply but we train our clients to help them bring to their clients the very best service available.We pride ou
pages/pages__about-us.copy:
ABOUT US
WHO WE ARE

Founded in Romsey in 2011 by the company’s proud name sake, Viola Hair Extensions the UK’s premium supplier of high-quality hair extensions to the hairdressing and beauty industries. Not only do we supply but we train our clients to help them bring to their clients the very best service available.

We pride ourselves on being able to help everyone who seeks to enhance or transform their look to find just that – hair extensions that give the wow factor!

Viola is well established and respected within the industry with business offices, warehousing and a demonstration salon and a dedicated team waiting to hear from you. We only supply the best as we know only the best is good enough for our clients.

WHAT'S IMPORTANT TO US

We supply our European Remy hair extensions in a wide variety of types, colours, lengths and weights, together with tools and now the techniques to help propel your salon to the top of the industry. We have all the products and experience to help you ensure that you are able to help your clients achieve their ultimate look.

Our trade customers are extremely important to us and we work closely with salons to offer support and encouragement to build their business…Your success is our success and we work together to achieve maximum growth.

We believe that love is in the hair so let’s work together and raise the profile of perfect hair extensions.

Long may it last!

pages/pages__careers.title: Careers – Viola Hair Extensions
pages/pages__careers.metaDescription: New Job offer JOIN OUR TEAM: CUSTOMER SUPPORT/SERVICE MANAGER RECRUITMENT DRIVE   Are you passionate about customer service and looking to make a significant impact in a growing company? Viola Hair Extensions Ltd. is excited to announce our recruitment drive for a dedicated and experienced Customer Support/Service Mana
pages/pages__careers.copy:
CAREERS
NEW JOB OFFER

JOIN OUR TEAM:

CUSTOMER SUPPORT/SERVICE MANAGER RECRUITMENT DRIVE

 

Are you passionate about customer service and looking to make a significant impact in a growing company? Viola Hair Extensions Ltd. is excited to announce our recruitment drive for a dedicated and experienced Customer Support/Service Manager. We are on the lookout for a dynamic individual who can develop and lead our customer support department, driving exceptional service and customer satisfaction.

 

About Us

At Viola Hair Extensions Ltd., we take pride in providing high-quality hair extensions and hair care products. Our commitment to exceptional product quality and outstanding customer service has positioned us as a leader in the industry. As we continue to expand, we are seeking a motivated Customer Support/Service Manager to join our team and help us maintain our high standards while fostering growth and innovation.

 

Job Description

We are seeking a Customer Support/Service Manager who is passionate about customer service and possesses strong leadership skills. The ideal candidate will be adept at developing and implementing effective support strategies, ensuring that our customers receive the best possible service. This role is pivotal in driving sales through effective upselling techniques and growing clients' accounts, as well as managing our social media channels to enhance customer engagement and brand visibility.

 

Key Responsibilities

Develop and implement customer support strategies to enhance customer satisfaction and loyalty.
Lead, manage, and mentor the customer support team to ensure high performance and continuous improvement.
Oversee daily operations of the customer support department, ensuring efficient and effective resolution of customer inquiries and issues.
Monitor and analyse customer support metrics to identify areas for improvement and implement necessary changes.
Collaborate with other departments to ensure a seamless customer experience and address any cross-functional issues.
Handle escalated customer complaints and provide timely and effective solutions.
Train and develop team members on best practices and company policies.
Maintain up-to-date knowledge of industry trends and best practices in customer support.
Encourage and train the customer support team to upsell additional products and services, contributing to increased sales and revenue.
Develop and implement strategies for upselling and cross-selling to maximize customer value.
Proactively identify opportunities to grow clients' accounts by understanding their needs and recommending additional products or services.
Build and maintain strong relationships with clients to ensure their satisfaction and loyalty.
Manage and oversee the company’s social media channels, ensuring timely and engaging content is posted regularly.
Respond to customer inquiries and comments on social media platforms in a professional and timely manner.
Monitor social media metrics to assess the effectiveness of social media strategies and make adjustments as needed.

 

Qualifications

Proven experience in a customer support or service management role, preferably in the hair or beauty industry.
Strong leadership and team management skills.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
Ability to develop and implement effective customer support strategies.
Proficiency in customer support software and tools.
Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to handle challenging customer situations.
Highly organized with the ability to multitask and prioritize tasks effectively.
Experience in sales or upselling techniques is highly desirable.
Demonstrated ability to grow clients' accounts and increase sales through effective relationship management.
Experience managing social media channels and creating engaging content.
Familiarity with social media analytics and metrics.

 

Benefits

Competitive salary
Employee discounts on Viola Hair Extensions products
Holiday package increasing with length of service
Regular working hours from Monday to Friday, 8:30 am to 4:30 pm

 

How to Apply

If you are passionate about customer service and have the skills and experience to lead our customer support team, we would love to hear from you. Please submit your resume and a cover letter outlining your qualifications and experience to: jobs@violahairextensions.co.uk

 

We look forward to welcoming a new member to our team who shares our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction. Apply today and be a part of the Viola Hair Extensions family!

pages/pages__hair-extension-training.title: Hair Extension Course and Training – Viola Hair Extensions
pages/pages__hair-extension-training.metaDescription: At Viola, we are looking for like-minded people to participate in our hair extension training courses. Are you looking to offer something different to your clients that will help to increase your income? Do you want to develop and learn new skills, or even start a new business adventure? We are offering exclusive hair
pages/pages__hair-extension-training.copy:
HAIR EXTENSION TRAINING

At Viola, we are looking for like-minded people to participate in our hair extension training courses. Are you looking to offer something different to your clients that will help to increase your income? Do you want to develop and learn new skills, or even start a new business adventure?

We are offering exclusive hair extension training courses at our Viola Academy Centre, we have highly qualified trainers with a wealth of industry experience to give you all the skills you will need to succeed. Training is provided in small groups that is engaging & knowledgeable in a fun, relaxed environment with plenty of opportunity for one to one communication.

WHY VIOLA ACADEMY?

Our Viola Academy hair extension training has been created for the benefit of stylists that want to extend their knowledge. Our professional hair extension training is tailored to include Nano tip, Tape-in, Beaded Weave & Eaziweave. These categories can be tailored for a complete beginner, or for an experienced hairdresser.

Our hair extension training courses are held over 1 or 2 days sessions where you can gain full certification. We take great pride in what we do and promise to provide the finest training to ensure that our students have the best knowledge and skills needed to become an approved and certified Extensionist.

HAIR EXTENSION TRAINING COURSE DATES
DATES COMING SOON!

Each course includes full professional kits, Viola Colour ring and exclusive trade discount.

For more information or to book email us support@violahairextensions.co.uk or contact us on 01794 840130 require a holding fee of £50.00 which will be taken off the balance.

IN-SALON TRAINING

At Viola we recognise the difficulties a busy salon has allowing stylists to attend courses to learn new skills to enhance the business. This is why we have In-Salon training tailored to your business and your needs where we can train stylists in one session. These are bespoke training days offered to excel the salon’s skill, knowledge and income.

ONLINE HAIR EXTENSION TRAINING COURSE – COMING SOON!

Do you want to benefit from our exclusive Academy but are unable to attend our training days here at the Viola? Why not try one of our online courses giving you access to step by step video’s allowing learning at you own pace, in your own time but still to the highest standards.

pages/pages__viola-academy.title: Viola Academy 29th November 2023 – Viola Hair Extensions
pages/pages__viola-academy.metaDescription: Welcome to the Viola Academy, the ultimate destination for hair extension education. Whether you're a seasoned stylist or just starting out, our comprehensive training courses will equip you with the skills and knowledge you need to succeed in the world of hair extensions. At Viola, we are looking for like-minded peopl
pages/pages__viola-academy.copy:
VIOLA ACADEMY

Welcome to the Viola Academy, the ultimate destination for hair extension education. Whether you're a seasoned stylist or just starting out, our comprehensive training courses will equip you with the skills and knowledge you need to succeed in the world of hair extensions.

At Viola, we are looking for like-minded people to participate in our hair extension training courses. Are you looking to offer something different to your clients that will help to increase your income? Do you want to develop and learn new skills, or even start a new business adventure?
Our Viola Academy hair extension training has been created for the benefit of stylists that want to extend their knowledge. Our professional hair extension training is tailored to include Nano tip, Tape-in, Beaded Weave. These categories can be tailored for a complete beginner, or for an experienced hairdresser.

Viola Academy has 3 ways in which you can train to be an exceptional hair extensionist…
We have our in-house training here at Viola Academy Centre in Romsey, near Southampton.
Also available is our in-salon training where our educator comes to your salon, and now we have our brand new online courses, where you can learn in the comfort of your own home.
All 3 methods (Nano, Tape-ins and Beaded Weave) are available however you decide to learn.

At the Viola Academy, we believe that education is the key to success. That's why we offer courses designed to meet the needs of stylists. Our expert instructors have years of experience in the hair extension industry and are committed to helping you achieve your goals.

THE BEST HAIR EXTENSION COURSES

Our courses cover everything from the fundamentals of hair extensions to the latest installation techniques and trends. You'll learn how to work with a variety of extension types, including nano tip, tape-in, beaded weave, and more, and gain the skills you need to create stunning, natural-looking results for your clients.
In addition to our in-person training courses, we also offer online courses for those who prefer to learn at their own pace. Our online courses are designed to be flexible and convenient, with interactive modules that make it easy to learn and practice from the comfort of your own home.

Viola Academy firmly holds the belief that education is paramount to achieving success. That's why we're committed to providing the highest quality training and support for our students. We offer ongoing mentorship and guidance, as well as access to the latest industry news and trends, to help you continue to grow and develop your skills long after you've completed your course.

So why wait? Visit the Viola Academy today and discover the power of education. Whether you're looking to start a career in hair extensions or take your existing skills tothe next level, we've got the training and support you need to succeed.

pages/pages__in-salon.title: In Salon – Viola Hair Extensions
pages/pages__in-salon.metaDescription: Welcome to Viola Academy in-salon training services, the perfect solution for salons looking to expand their hair extension services and offer their clients the highest quality results. Our expert instructors will come directly to your salon and provide comprehensive training on the latest hair extension techniques, in
pages/pages__in-salon.copy:
IN SALON

Welcome to Viola Academy in-salon training services, the perfect solution for salons looking to expand their hair extension services and offer their clients the highest quality results. Our expert instructors will come directly to your salon and provide comprehensive training on the latest hair extension techniques, including nano tip, tape-in, beaded weave and more.

With our on-site training services, you can train your entire team in the latest hair extension techniques without ever leaving your salon. Our expert instructors will guide you through every step of the process, from selecting the right extension type and color to installation, styling, and maintenance.

HAIR EXTENSIONS IN THE SALON - COURSE

Our on-site training courses are designed to be flexible and convenient, with customizable options to meet the specific needs and goals of your salon. We'll work with you to create a training program that fits your schedule and budget, so you can expand your services and offer your clients the highest quality results.

At Viola we recognise the difficulties a busy salon has allowing stylists to attend courses to learn new skills to enhance the business. This is why we have In-Salon training tailored to your business and your needs where we can train stylists in one session. These are bespoke training days offered to excel the salon’s skill, knowledge and income.

Viola Academy endeavors to provide its students with exceptional education and assistance. We take pride in offering ongoing mentorship and guidance that will empower you to keep honing your skills and knowledge long after finishing your course. With us, you'll receive comprehensive training that is designed to help you reach your fullest potential and become a true expert in hair extensions.
Bring the highest quality hair extension services to your salon with Viola Hair Extensions' on-site training services. With our expert instructors, customizable training options, and ongoing support, you'll be well on your way to creating beautiful, natural-looking results for your clients and growing your salon business. Contact us today to learn more and schedule your on-site training course at your salon.

pages/pages__190-day-guarantee.title: 190 Day Guarantee – Viola Hair Extensions
pages/pages__190-day-guarantee.metaDescription: 190 Days Quality Guarantee Viola Hair Extensions comes with 190 days Quality Guaranteed this is provided that the extensions are fitted by a qualified Extensionist, follow the aftercare advice and use Viola approved aftercare products. Please note that any complaints or issues regarding hair extensions will only be acc
pages/pages__190-day-guarantee.copy:
190 DAY GUARANTEE

190 Days Quality Guarantee

Viola Hair Extensions comes with 190 days Quality Guaranteed this is provided that the extensions are fitted by a qualified Extensionist, follow the aftercare advice and use Viola approved aftercare products.

Please note that any complaints or issues regarding hair extensions will only be accepted from customers with a certificate, as our products are for professional use only.

What does this warranty cover?

Any defects that arise due to faulty materials or workmanship will either be replaced or issued a credit to spend in-store or online.

What is not covered?

Accidental damage or misuse.
Damage occurred when exposed to excessive heat, salt water, UV rays and chlorine.
Damages caused by the owner modifying, attempting to fix or otherwise altering the product.
Costs incurred for diagnosing, repairing, removing, installing, shipping, servicing, or handling.
Items sold at sale price. All sale hair extensions are final sale and are not eligible for a return, refund or warranty.
Certain colours may fade over time. Fading of colours will not be considered a manufacturer defect.
After 190 days from date of purchase the hair guarantee will be considered expired, no claims can be made after this time.

The guarantee is subject to the following provisions;

Must be correctly fitted by a qualified Hair Extensionist in the relevant application method.
Aftercare followed in accordance with the aftercare instructions. For more information regarding aftercare please follow the link (insert link)
Viola aftercare products must be used (approximately 1000ml shampoo and 500ml conditioner within 6 months) as they have been specially formulated to keep the quality of the hair extensions. Viola aftercare products must be purchased alongside the hair extensions. Must be able to provide proof of purchase for both hair extensions and aftercare.
Extensionist must keep tear away slip confirming that the client has read and understood the aftercare information.
Clients must have regular maintenance, left no longer than three months.

What will we do to correct problems?

In the event that the hair extension is deemed as defective, we will then either issue a full credit to the account (Store Credit Only) or partial credit. We reserve the right to determine how much of credit shall be issued based on many factors such as usage and claim dates.
If possible, the product can be replaced.
Cost of postage will be refunded.

How long does the coverage last?

Our hair extensions are guaranteed for 190 days from the date of original purchase.

What do you have to do?

If you feel you have a claim then you must do the following;

Contact us via email within the 190 days of purchase with all the information of your purchase.
Claim must be made with the buyer of the items, must include the purchase information. Please note that any complaints or issues regarding hair extensions will only be accepted from customers with a certificate, as our products are for professional use only.
A claim form will be sent and needs to be filled in and returned.
Provide all aftercare information including the tear away slip signed and dated by client.
You must remove all the hair extensions and it must be sent back within 14 days after the claim is reported.
Cost for removal and fitting of hair extensions will not be covered.
Our Quality Control team will inspect the hair and determine if the hair is, in fact, defective from manufacturing.
We will then contact you by email address with further details.
Ensure when posting items are properly packed to avoid damage in transit. The product is the responsibility of the customer until it reaches Viola Hair Extensions Ltd.

But they can be time-consuming to put in and an investment in time and money. blogs/blogs__news__caring-for-your-viola.copy:
NOW READING: CARING FOR YOUR VIOLA HAIR EXTENSIONS
SHARE    PREV
JANUARY 02, 2019
CARING FOR YOUR VIOLA HAIR EXTENSIONS

Table of contents

Hair extensions are great when you want to add a little extra oomph to your hairstyle. But they can be time-consuming to put in and an investment in time and money. It’s essential, therefore, to care for your hair extensions, making sure that you do everything you can to ensure their health and longevity.

There’s already a lot of information online about how to care for your hair extensions, but some of it is conflicting and may leave you feeling a little confused. Not to worry, we’re going to investigate some of the tried and tested methods to care for your Viola Hair Extensions, so that you can rest assured in the knowledge that you’re getting the very best advice.

Shall we dive in?

HOW TO WASH HAIR EXTENSIONS

If you look after your hair extensions in the same way that you care for your normal hair, you could run into trouble. Hair extensions have special requirements and may become damaged or loose if they come into contact with your regular shampoo and conditioner combo.

Viola hair extensions, like most extensions on the market, should be paired with Viola aftercare products which protect the bond between the hair and the scalp while simultaneously ensuring that the hair remains clean and frizz-free.

When choosing an aftercare product, make sure that you stick with those recommended by Viola, as these will have already been tested on the particular bond, helping you to avoid embarrassing slippages or detachments. The right hair care treatment will ensure that your hair extensions maintain their quality, giving you confidence.

Three more things:

ONLY CONDITION THE MID-LENGTHS AND TIPS

You might think that once you’ve got the correct aftercare products that you can just continue with your normal routine. But this is not the case. Although you are free to shampoo from root to tip, the same does not apply to conditioner. Experts advise that you only condition the mid-lengths and the tips, as conditioning the scalp could cause the bonds to come loose.

WASH HAIR IN LUKEWARM WATER

Your hair and hair extensions are unlikely to get dirty to the point where they need to be washed in hot water. Lukewarm water will suffice 99 percent of the time. That’s just as well since experts recommend that people with hair extensions only use lukewarm water to avoid damaging both their hair and the hair in their hair extensions.

WASH UPRIGHT

Finally, experts recommend that those with hair extensions only wash their hair in an upright position. The reason? Washing hair at different angles can lead you to “flip” your hair, which in turn can cause tangles. Getting tangles out of hair extensions can be a nightmare, especially if doing so puts too much tension on the bond.

CURLING HAIR EXTENSIONS

We’d all love to have more bounce and volume in our hair. Curling your hair extensions is a great way to achieve this. But how do you curl them without damaging them in the process?

USE A LOW HEAT WHEN HOT CURLING

Make sure that you use the lowest heat option available when hot curling. Viola hair extensions are 100 percent natural human hair, and so irons that are too hot will lead to damage, just as it would to your regular hair. Turn the setting down to the minimum temperature available to ensure the longevity and vitality of your extensions.

PULL GENTLY ON YOUR EXTENSIONS AS YOU CURL

The last thing you want when curling your hair is to yank it out at the root, ruining all your hard work. Pull on hair extensions gentle (no matter what curling method you’re using), with the force that you’d pull on a sliding drawer.

ALWAYS CURL EXTENSIONS WHILE ATTACHED TO YOUR HEAD

Some people think that you can curl hair extensions as they come out of the packet. But it turns out that this is poor hair extension care. Pre-curling hair extensions often prevents you from carrying out the installation process and also can lead to oddly-placed curls, ruining your style. Install hair extensions first, and the curl after.

WORK IN LARGE SECTIONS

Usually, people curl their regular hair in small sections so that they can create as many ringlets as possible. But applying the same technique to hair extensions may be a mistake. The reason is that creating many smaller curls ultimately involves more brushing and more hair breakage. Stylists, therefore, recommend that people use big combs and larger swaths of hair and form Viola extended hair into bigger curls.

ADDITIONAL CARE

Now that you’ve got washing and curling sorted, what else do you need to do to make sure that you look after your hair extensions correctly?

DETANGLE BEFORE BED

Managing your hair extensions can be a nightmare, especially in the mornings after a night of tossing and turning in bed. Experts say that brushing your hair in the evening before you go to bed and wear in a single plait will make it much easier to manage the following day.

APPLY INTENSIVE CONDITIONING TREATMENTS WEEKLY

Hair extensions do not receive natural oils secreted by pores in the scalp as regular hair does. As a result, they can quickly become dry and brittle, especially brands like Viola that use 100 percent natural human hair. As a result, you should use Viola deep-conditioning serum once per week to ensure that the inherent plasticity and flexibility of the hair remains.

DON’T GO TO BE WITH WET HAIR

Wet hair tends to warp and twist as it dries. In doing so, it can become tangled, especially during the night as you move around with the hair in contact with your pillow. Wet hair extensions that dry during the night are a nightmare to brush in the morning. Again, applying too much pressure while trying to eliminate knots can lead to damage to the bonds and cuticles, so make sure you allow adequate time to dry before you hit the sack.

So there you have it: a quick and easy guide to caring for your Viola extensions. Be beautiful.

If you’ve enjoyed these tips contact Viola Hair Extensions to find out more about our academy. We are recognised hair extension suppliers located in the UK.

WRITTEN BY ANDRZEJ WALCZAK

Get the hair right and everything else just falls into place. But for those who like to change their look often, the prospect of growing out their hair is nigh-o
blogs/blogs__news__clipping-in-hair-exte.copy:
NOW READING: CLIPPING IN HAIR EXTENSIONS: THE VIOLA GUIDE
SHARE    PREVNEXT 
JANUARY 02, 2019
CLIPPING IN HAIR EXTENSIONS: THE VIOLA GUIDE

Table of contents

As recognised hair extension suppliers, Viola Hair Extensions offer quality, professional products because we know great hair is an integral part of any look. Get the hair right and everything else just falls into place. But for those who like to change their look often, the prospect of growing out their hair is nigh-on impossible. Likewise micro-ring extensions can seem like way too much of a commitment. That’s why God in His infinite wisdom invented clip-in hair extensions. These can be used quickly and relatively easily to create a dazzling array of looks… And when the wearer is done with it, she can simply unclip her extensions and try something completely different.

While hair extensions offer the capricious diva an opportunity to create a huge array of incredible looks quickly and change them regularly, there’s a knack to getting them just right. If you’ve ever wanted a definitive guide to how to clip in or remove hair extensions, if you’ve ever wondered how long they last or which are the best ones for you… Read on!

HOW TO CLIP IN HAIR EXTENSIONS

The beauty of clip-in hair extensions is that they can give you a length and volume that you may not be able to achieve with your natural hair. The key lies with clipping them in properly for a seamless and natural look.

This tutorial is assuming that you’re going for a full head of extensions. For this, as well as your extensions, you’ll need a mirror, a hair clip and a soft paddle brush.

STEP 1

Start with a 3 clip weft. Before you start you need to brush your own hair thoroughly using your soft paddle brush to rid it of any tangles which could complicate things. Separate a straight thin section of your hair with a finger or a comb at the nape of your neck. Now, clip the rest of your hair away by using a hair clip.

Take your 3 clip weft and brush it out, starting at the bottom and working your way up the weft before clipping it into your hair. Measure the weft against your head to make sure that it’s just the right size to fit seamlessly into the sectioned hair.

Clip in the middle clip at the centre of your head, clipping it securely into the roots of your hair. Getting the clip as close to the roots as possible will help keep the weft secure and make for a more natural look.

You can make it a little easier by pulling that section slightly away from your scalp to get some leverage. Alternatively you can tease it to make the base more secure.

With the middle clip in place, secure the left and right sides.

STEP 2

Separate out a section of your hair that’s thin and straight above the first clipped weft. Now clip the rest of the hair away with a hair clip.

Now, take a smaller 4 clip weft. Again, brush it from bottom to top, making sure that it’s free of knots. Again, measure it up to ensure a perfect fit on your head.

Find the centre of your head and clip the middle two clips into your roots first, before clipping in the side clips. There should be no bumps in the weft, so ensure this by stretching the weft to the sides slightly when you’re clipping in the middle clips.

STEP 3

Now you’ll need the largest 4 clip weft. Separate a straight and thin section of hair from ear to ear just above the second clipped in weft. Clip away the rest of your hair to keep it out of the way.

Brush out the largest weft and measure it up against your head for a close fit. Clip in the middle two clips before securing the sides.

STEP 4

Separate out another straight thin section of hair roughly 2” below the crown of your head and clip away the rest of the hair. Now take the second 3 clip weft.

Once again, brush it out thoroughly and measure it against your head for a perfect fit. Once again,. find the centre of your head, secure the middle clip deep into the roots before securing the side clips.

Now, all the large wefts at the back of the head are in, we just need to secure the small ones.

STEP 5

The remaining wefts that go on the sides of your hair. These add volume to the sides and make for a more seamless look.

Separate a section of hair around 2” two inches above one ear (you can start on the left or right, it’s up to you). Clip the rest of the hair away and take a 2 clip weft. Secure it closest to your hairline first. Now secure the second clip closer to the back of the head.

Then simply repeat the same process on the other side of your head.  

Now you just need to brush out your hair and check with your mirror to ensure that the wefts are hidden.

And that’s it, you’ve successfully clipped in your extensions. Easy, wasn’t it?

HOW LONG DO HAIR EXTENSIONS LAST?

It really depends on which kinds of hair extensions you choose. The good news is that Viola’s hair extensions are made from top quality human hair. It is considered to be the top of the line in human hair because it has its cuticles kept intact facing the same directions from root to end. This helps to prevent tangling and matting while helping it to remain in peak condition with a proper care for over a year.

If you opt for something more permanent than clip-ins, tape-ins maintenance 6-8 weeks, hair can last over 6 months (with proper care), while keratin tips last 4-8 weeks, and e-bonded extensions tend to last for 6-8 weeks too!

HOW DO I REMOVE CLIP IN?

Clip-in extensions are really easy to remove. This 5 step process will make it seem as though they were never there and give you an instant transformation;

STEP 1

Part your hair to expose the top of the first clip extension you want to remove. We recommend starting at the top of your head and working your way down.

STEP 2

Place your thumbs down on either side of the top of the clip, place your index fingers on both sides underneath your thumbs.

STEP 3

Press your thumbs down and apply outward pressure with your index fingers. The clip should snap open easily. Open all the clips in the weft in this way before attempting to remove the weft.

STEP 4

Gently lift the opened clips up and away from your hair. Be as slow and gentle as possible to avoid pulling out any of your own hairs.

STEP 5

Repeat the same process for the rest of your extensions.

Easy peasy!

WHICH ARE THE BEST VIOLA HAIR EXTENSIONS?

That really depends on you!

Do you want something that’s temporary or more permanent? Do you want something that’s easy to maintain or are you happy to trade convenience for permanence. Whether you choose clip-ins, tape-ins, i-tip hair extensions, or nano hair extensions, you can rest assured knowing that your extensions are made to last for as long as possible and are made with the highest quality human hair for a long lasting and incredibly natural look!

WRITTEN BY ANDRZEJ WALCZAK

blogs/blogs__news__everything-you-need-t.copy:
NOW READING: EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW ABOUT HAIR EXTENSION AFTERCARE
SHARE    PREVNEXT 
SEPTEMBER 02, 2020
EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW ABOUT HAIR EXTENSION AFTERCARE

Table of contents

Aftercare and maintenance is key to keeping your extensions looking and feeling amazing. At Viola, we offer 190 days quality guarantee with all our professional hair extensions.

It has been proven that with the correct aftercare, the use of Viola care products and regular maintenance the hair will last well over 190 days, even over a year.

Viola has put together tips and advice on looking after your new beautiful hair extensions.

HOW TO TAKE CARE OF HAIR EXTENSIONS - A CARE GUIDE 
WASHING

Viola Hair Extension Shampoo and Conditioner is recommended, it's been tried, tested and proven to keep our extensions healthy and strong. The use of the Viola care range coincides with 190 days quality guarantee.

Hair must be detangled before washing with a bristle or detangling brush. Keep your head upright while wet, do not twist or rub instead massage the scalp gently with your fingertips.

Do not apply any conditioner onto the roots and bonds. Gently squeeze and pat wet hair, be sure not to wrap your hair up in a towel, to avoid matting and tangling.

BRUSHING & BLOW-DRYING

When the hair is wet it is very important not to brush through rather gently run your fingers through the hair the ease any knots.

Blow-dry until the hair is dry, using a bristle or detangling brush start from the ends and work way up towards the roots.  At all times supporting the hair by holding the extensions at the top. Be sure to add heat protection, Viola shake and protect or Viola heat serum.

STYLING

The hair extensions can be styled using straighteners, curler, hair driers etc, be aware that exposure to heat can impact on the lifespan of the hair extensions same as it would on your natural hair.

Avoid heated tools coming into contact with the bonds as it can cause it to melt.

Bleaching, dying etc extensions can shorten the lifespan and extensions will no longer be covered by the warranty.

Viola Extensions Boost and Viola Argan Oil used regularly will help to replenish essential nutrients that may have been lost over time.

SLEEPING

It is so important that your hair is completely dry when sleeping, as moisture will cause the extensions to become matted. Brush and braid your hair into one plat before going to bed, brush through in the morning.

HOLIDAY, SWIMMING, SAUNA, SALT WATER, SUNBATHING

Braid your hair into one plat, make sure the extensions do not come into contact with sun cream, chlorine or salt water as it can cause hair to discolour, feel dry and brittle. Exposure to UV and heat can also cause this to occur why it is important when in direct sunlight to cover hair extensions.

Viola Extensions Boost will add vital minerals to the extensions. If extensions do change colour due to the above it is not covered by the guarantee. 

For more information on colour change please visit the FAQ.

MAINTENANCE

Regular maintenance is extremely important to avoid matting and damaging natural hair and extensions.

With careful attention and precise care, the extensions will remain in excellent condition. Less stress that is put on the extensions the better to keep looking the hair looking and feeling luxurious.

BLONDE HAIR

Due to the chemical process, blonde extensions have been through to lightening means that that hair is more susceptible to change. Discolouring to pink/orange and a brassy colour. The main causes are sun cream, oils, seawater, chlorine, sweat, UV Rays and heat extra care must be taken.

For more information please visit the FAQ.

WRITTEN BY ANDRZEJ WALCZAK
